.dotnet/.dotnet/TelemetryStorageService/.title: Upstash Redis REST Token
.dotnet/.dotnet/TelemetryStorageService/.description: Upstash Redis tokens grant access to your serverless Redis database.
.dotnet/.dotnet/TelemetryStorageService/.fix: Move to environment variable or secrets manager

.dotnet/.dotnet/TelemetryStorageService/.title: Historical Secret: Upstash Redis REST Token
.dotnet/.dotnet/TelemetryStorageService/.description: Secret was removed from code but still exists in git history (commit c10be0d43e, Sun Mar 15 21:09:20 2026 +0300). Anyone with repo access can retrieve it.
.dotnet/.dotnet/TelemetryStorageService/.fix: Rotate this credential immediately, then clean history: npx bfg --replace-text passwords.txt

frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.title: SQL Injection via Template Literal
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.description: SQL query with interpolated template variable. Use parameterized queries ($1, ?) or an ORM.
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.fix: Use parameterized queries: db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1", [userId])

.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..title: CI/CD: pull_request_target with PR Checkout
.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..description: pull_request_target trigger detected. Runs with base branch privileges and can be exploited if combined with PR checkout.
.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..fix: Use pull_request trigger instead, or never checkout PR branch in pull_request_target

.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..title: CI/CD: Unpinned GitHub Action (uses @main/master)
.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..description: GitHub Action pinned to mutable tag. Pin to a specific commit SHA.
.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..fix: Pin to commit SHA: uses: actions/checkout@abcdef1234567890 # v4.1.0

.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..title: CI/CD: Unverified Third-Party Action
.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..description: Third-party GitHub Action not from verified publisher. Review source code.
.github/workflows/dependabot-auto-merge..fix: Pin to commit SHA, review the action source, or use an official alternative

frontend/app/api/auth/login/route.ts.title: Privacy: Password Stored in Plaintext
frontend/app/api/auth/login/route.ts.description: Password appears to be stored directly from user input without hashing. Passwords must be hashed before storage.
frontend/app/api/auth/login/route.ts.fix: Hash passwords with bcrypt, scrypt, or argon2 before storing: await bcrypt.hash(password, 12)

frontend/app/api/auth/register/route.ts.title: Privacy: Password Stored in Plaintext
frontend/app/api/auth/register/route.ts.description: Password appears to be stored directly from user input without hashing. Passwords must be hashed before storage.
frontend/app/api/auth/register/route.ts.fix: Hash passwords with bcrypt, scrypt, or argon2 before storing: await bcrypt.hash(password, 12)

frontend/components/ui/chart.tsx.title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
frontend/components/ui/chart.tsx.description: dangerouslySetInnerHTML can introduce XSS if the value contains user input.

frontend/components/ui/custom/prompt/cod.title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
frontend/components/ui/custom/prompt/cod.description: dangerouslySetInnerHTML can introduce XSS if the value contains user input.

backend/src/RentACar.API/Dockerfile.title: Docker: Running as Root
backend/src/RentACar.API/Dockerfile.description: No USER instruction found. Container runs as root by default.

backend/src/RentACar.API/Dockerfile.title: Dockerfile: No Non-Root USER
backend/src/RentACar.API/Dockerfile.description: No USER instruction found. Container runs as root, enabling escape attacks.
backend/src/RentACar.API/Dockerfile.fix:
Add before CMD: RUN addgroup -S app && adduser -S app -G app
USER app

backend/src/RentACar.Worker/Dockerfile.title: Docker: Running as Root
backend/src/RentACar.Worker/Dockerfile.description: No USER instruction found. Container runs as root by default.

backend/src/RentACar.Worker/Dockerfile.title: Dockerfile: No Non-Root USER
backend/src/RentACar.Worker/Dockerfile.description: No USER instruction found. Container runs as root, enabling escape attacks.
backend/src/RentACar.Worker/Dockerfile.fix:
Add before CMD: RUN addgroup -S app && adduser -S app -G app
USER app

frontend/components/auth/reset-password-.title: Agent: Credentials Passed Between Tools
frontend/components/auth/reset-password-.description: Agent forwards credentials between tools or to external services. Compromised tools can steal credentials.
frontend/components/auth/reset-password-.fix: Scope credentials per-tool. Never forward authentication tokens between tool invocations.

frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ac.title: Privacy: PII Column Without Encryption
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ac.description: Database column storing sensitive PII (SSN, credit card, passport) without encryption-at-rest annotation.
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ac.fix: Encrypt sensitive PII columns at the application level or use database-level encryption.

frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/cr.title: Privacy: Real Email Address Hardcoded
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/cr.description: Real email address hardcoded in source code (not @example.com). May be PII or a credential.
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/cr.fix: Use @example.com for test emails. Store real emails in environment variables or config.

frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ec.fix: Encrypt sensitive PII columns at the application level or use database-level encryption.

frontend/proxy.ts.title: No Rate Limiting on Authentication
frontend/proxy.ts.description: Auth endpoints without rate limiting are vulnerable to brute-force attacks.
frontend/proxy.ts.fix: Add rate limiting: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, or Cloudflare rules

frontend/components/auth/customer-regist.title: No Rate Limiting on Authentication
frontend/components/auth/customer-regist.description: Auth endpoints without rate limiting are vulnerable to brute-force attacks.

frontend/components/auth/login-form.tsx.description: Real email address hardcoded in source code (not @example.com). May be PII or a credential.
frontend/components/auth/login-form.tsx.fix: Use @example.com for test emails. Store real emails in environment variables or config.

frontend/components/layout/sidebar/nav-m.title: LLM Endpoint Without Rate Limiting
frontend/components/layout/sidebar/nav-m.description: AI endpoint without rate limiting. Users could rack up API costs.
frontend/components/layout/sidebar/nav-m.fix: Add rate limiting per user: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, etc.

frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.title: LLM Endpoint Without Rate Limiting
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.description: AI endpoint without rate limiting. Users could rack up API costs.
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.fix: Add rate limiting per user: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, etc.

frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.title: Privacy: Precise Geolocation Stored
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.description: Precise geolocation data stored in database. May require explicit consent under GDPR/CCPA.
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/ap.fix: Reduce precision of stored geolocation (city-level, not street-level). Require explicit consent for precise location.

frontend/hooks/use-file-upload.ts.title: RAG: Excessive Retrieved Context
frontend/hooks/use-file-upload.ts.description: Retrieving a very large number of chunks (50+). Increases the attack surface for prompt injection via poisoned documents.
frontend/hooks/use-file-upload.ts.fix: Limit retrieved chunks to the minimum needed (typically 3-10). More chunks = more injection surface.

frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/fi.title: RAG: Excessive Retrieved Context
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/fi.description: Retrieving a very large number of chunks (50+). Increases the attack surface for prompt injection via poisoned documents.
frontend/app/(admin)/dashboard/(auth)/fi.fix: Limit retrieved chunks to the minimum needed (typically 3-10). More chunks = more injection surface.
